response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and three distinct songs were identified by on-screen text. For the first song, "ふれ・れ・どぅ・しー・でい", searches did not return specific lyrics, so they are marked as null. For the second song, "テトリス", "柊マグネタイト" (Hiiragi Magnetite) was identified as the composer and lyrics were found. For the third song, "絶対アイドル辞めないで", "=LOVE" was identified as the artist and lyrics were found. All lyrics are condensed to their main verses for the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performed by Hololive VTubers Natsuiro Matsuri, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, and Aki Rosenthal.

scenes.description: The performers start the medley with the song "ふれ・れ・どぅ・しー・でい" with the title displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: ふれ・れ・どぅ・しー・でい
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, and Aki Rosenthal

scenes.description: The second song of the medley, "テトリス" by Hiiragi Magnetite, starts with the title and composer credited on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, and Aki Rosenthal
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どうしてすぐ知ってしまうの
共振で苦しんでし罵倒
Q. 更新で降る隕石抹消可？
悪くない
興味ねえ救い派手感動
常備ねえ薬食べBAD
Q. 超酷えフル見た目暗号化？
金による...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Why do you know it immediately?
Suffering from resonance, I curse
Q. Can the meteorite falling in the update be erased?
Not bad
I'm not interested in salvation, flashy excitement
I don't have medicine on hand, taking it is BAD
Q. Is the super-brutal full appearance encrypted?
Because of money...

scenes.description: The third song, "絶対アイドル辞めないで" by =LOVE, starts.
scenes.song_title: 絶対アイドル辞めないで
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato, and Aki Rosenthal
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
絶対 アイドル辞めないで（ずっと）
輝いてる君を見たい
もう ずっとずっとずっと
ステージにいて
私がもし君のとこ 離れたなら
君はちょっと寂しくなるかな
いじわる 考える
好きな人がいるのなら 内緒にして...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Absolutely, never stop being an Idol (Ever)
I want to see you shining
Already, forever and ever
Be on the stage
If I were to leave your side
Would you feel a little lonely?
Teasing, thinking
If you have someone you like
Keep it a secret...
